---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a rule variation, config option, or UX improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or variation.

**Is it a known house rule / official variant?**
Link or describe the rules. (We aim to support practical, well-defined variations.)

**Could it break or confuse a game?**
How should it be validated so it can't produce an illegal/unwinnable/confusing
game? (See the validation approach in `sh-engine.js`.)

**Alternatives considered**
Anything else you weighed.
